description: Design doc with missing auth + no rollback plan
design_doc:
# Payment Gateway Integration v1

We want to integrate a third-party payment gateway to handle customer card transactions.

## Integration points
- Customer checkout flow
- Third-party payment API

## Data
Handles card numbers and CVV during transaction. Data passed directly to payment provider.

## Notes
Authentication approach not yet decided. No rollback plan in place. Team not identified.
